question.ask: 10. Why couldn't the plane leave on time?

info.value: I'm David. Last Christmas, I had a terrible experience. I flew to America from Australia to celebrate Christmas with my family on the night before Christmas. I arrived at the airport forty minutes early and waited to check in. But thirty minutes before the plane was supposed to take off, the airport workers told us the bad news. The plane couldn't leave on time because the weather was too bad. I had to stay at the airport for four hours until the plane finally took off. I'll never forget that Christmas.
